about.title: About This Project
about.subtitle: A graduation thesis project in web development
about.project_description: This virtual tour web application was developed as a graduation thesis project. It aims to digitally showcase the rich cultural heritage and stunning tourist attractions of Uzbekistan, making them accessible to the world through an interactive web platform.
about.mission_description: To bridge the gap between physical travel limitations and the desire to explore the world. Through immersive virtual tours, 360° videos, and rich multimedia content, we bring Uzbekistan's greatest landmarks to your screen.
about.developer_description: Developed as part of a Bachelor's degree graduation thesis in Computer Science and Software Engineering.

footer.description: An immersive virtual tour platform showcasing the rich cultural heritage of Uzbekistan.
